title: End of Beta this Monday, March 23 – Get Ready for Daily Analysis (BTC, NVIDIA, GOLD)!
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hey Traders,

Consistency is the ultimate key to profitability. That’s why we are launching a new daily ritual: **every morning at 9:30 AM EST (15:30 in France)**, right as the US markets open, we will release comprehensive analyses of the most watched assets: **Bitcoin (BTC), NVIDIA (NVDA), and Gold (XAU/USD).**

**End of Beta Phase: Monday, March 23** The journey is evolving! Following a successful testing phase, we are officially closing the beta this **Monday, March 23**. To continue providing you with high-quality market data and Gemini-powered precision, we are transitioning to our subscription model.

**The HerculMarket Offer:**

* **Daily Insights:** Technical and fundamental breakdowns at the US open.
* **Asset Focus:** Crypto (BTC), Equities (NVIDIA), and Safe Havens (Gold).
* **Pricing:** A single flat rate of **€15 / month** to transform your trading routine.

Great traders rely on fixed schedules. Don't miss the Wall Street opening.

👉 **Join us here before the transition:**[https://herculmarket.com/](https://herculmarket.com/)

Trade safe! 🚀

comments.author: Patient_Kangaroo4864
comments.body: If you’re going to make daily calls, post a public, time-stamped track record. Otherwise it’s just more morning noise at 9:30.

replies.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
replies.body:
Fair point. Trading is about results, not just talk.

We completely agree that transparency is the difference between "morning noise" and a real tool. That’s exactly why we are moving out of Beta this Monday, March 23.

Starting with the official launch, every daily analysis (BTC, NVIDIA, Gold) will be archived with its timestamp. We aren't just making "calls"; we are providing deep technical and fundamental breakdowns right at the US open (9:30 AM EST / 15:30 CET) so you can see the logic behind the move.

We invite you to come "audit" the accuracy yourself starting Monday. At **€15/month**, we’re betting on the fact that the data speaks for itself.

Check out the setup here:[https://herculmarket.com/](https://herculmarket.com/)
